INSERT DATA { (:p1 a Person; name 'Alice'; age 30) };
INSERT DATA { (:p2 a Person; name 'Bob'; age 25) };
INSERT DATA { (:p3 a Person; name 'Charlie'; age 35) };
SELECT ?name WHERE { ?person a Person . ?person name ?name . FILTER(!( ?name = 'Alice' || ?name = 'Bob')) };
SELECT ?name WHERE { SELECT ?name WHERE { ?person a Person . ?person name ?name . } FILTER(!( ?name = 'Charlie' )) };
SELECT ?name WHERE { ?person a Person . FILTER(!(EXISTS { ?person age ?age . FILTER(?age < 30) })) } GROUP BY ?name;
SELECT ?name WHERE { ?person a Person . ?person name ?name . FILTER(!( ?name IN ('Alice', 'Bob'))) };
SELECT ?name WHERE { { SELECT ?name WHERE { ?person a Person . ?person name ?name . } } FILTER(!( ?name = 'Charlie' )) } ORDER BY ?name;
